subject: Re: RARE VIP Mountain Ranch Retreat Estate near LA
body:
Hi Jeffrey,

I wanted to email you personally about a property I think you might have interest in. It's a very large and rare mountain ranch estate that is perfectly suited for a corporate retreat

(or private) due to its location near LA and seclusion. Please contact me, Liz Potter, with any questions or to schedule a private showing.

Thank you!!

LUXURY EQUESTRIAN VIP RANCH ESTATE
==========

RARE MOUNTAIN RANCH SECLUDED RETREAT OUTSIDE LA
==========

33224 SEYMOUR CANYON ROAD, LOCKWOOD, CA 93225
==========

Listed at $14,990,000
==========

Stunning **240** acre private equestrian ranch retreat surrounded by over 100,000 acres of Los Padres National Forest. Located less than 1 hour 30 minutes from Los Angeles. Designed by the lead physicist on the Manhattan Project as an Eco-Lux safe haven fully self sustainable with extensive infrastructure and significant water resources. Completely untouched nature with unlimited opportunities for hiking and riding. Truly there is nothing else like it! For more info visit: www.SpringValleyRanchCA.com

7,000 sqft main house, guest & staff quarters

Luxurious horse facilities

Private, Secluded and Secure

Abundance of water - over 40+ springs and underground aquifers

Development Opportunities

Airstrip ready - Fly in/out

 

 

**For More Info:**

**www.SpringValleyRanchCA.com ( https://sable.godaddy.com/c/249841?id=657.29.1.3360cad828512a266b6bcb4d22599b33 )**
==========

**Elizabeth Potter**

**Vista Sotheby's International Realty**

**(858) 922-6929**
==========

**Email: LizPotter@LuxuryHomeCA.com**

* * *

**Elizabeth Potter**

**2501 N. Sepulveda Blvd.**

**Manhattan Beach, CA 90266**

**Elizabeth.Potter@vistasir.com**

**CALBRE# 01888003**
